# Release Checklist

- [ ] Ensure that the tag matches the version specified in `pyproject.toml`
- [ ] Update documentation as needed
- [ ] Run all tests to ensure everything is working as expected
- [ ] Check for any outstanding issues or pull requests that need addressing
- [ ] Verify that all dependencies are updated if necessary
- [ ] Tag the release appropriately

Please double-check that the version number is consistent across files before proceeding with the release!
